claims.claim: BIS Research confirms the precise Europe PDUs+PSUs combined figure: $2,455.7 million in 2024 growing to $20,056.7 million by 2035 at a 21.23% CAGR — the broader category the curated node explicitly excluded as a contaminated ceiling.
claims.sourceTitle: Europe Data Center Power Distribution Units and Power Supply Units Market: Focus on Application, Product, and Country - Analysis and Forecast, 2025-2035
claims.excerpt: The Europe data center PDUs and PSUs market is projected to reach $20,056.7 million by 2035 from $2,455.7 million in 2024, growing at a CAGR of 21.23% during the forecast period 2025-2035.

tensions.text: The curated node (tamBase) already flags the BIS/giiresearch $2,455.7M (2024) PDUs+PSUs figure at 21.23% CAGR as a 'contaminated ceiling' distinct from the intelligent-PDU segment's cited 10–12% CAGR (IndexBox), yet no source in this batch independently confirms that 10–12% intelligent-PDU CAGR — it remains an unverified input driving the node's band-narrowing logic.

Omdia's public taxonomy (Basic vs Networked rack PDUs) does not match the IndexBox 'Rack PDUs' vs 'Intelligent Rack PDUs' split referenced in the node's derivation chain, raising a definitional risk that the 'intelligent' share used to scope tamBase may not be measuring the same product boundary across sources.

IndexBox sells six separate country/segment reports (EU Rack PDUs, EU Intelligent Rack PDUs, Germany Rack PDUs, Germany Intelligent Rack PDUs, Eastern Europe Intelligent Rack PDUs, EU Data Center PDUs) that could directly settle the CE-7 base and intelligent share per the node's stated promotion path, yet all six remain unpurchased/paywalled — the promotion path is confirmed viable but still unexecuted.

absences: No numeric intelligent/switched PDU share of Germany or Central Europe rack-PDU revenue was found in any accessible snippet — all IndexBox country reports are paywalled at the headline-figure level.
No CE-7-scoped rack-PDU market size (in EUR or USD) was disclosed by any source in this batch; IndexBox's 'Eastern Europe' geography does not map cleanly onto the CE-7 definition used in the node.

Omdia's Rack PDU Market Tracker 2025 and Annual Market Analysis 2025 — the two reports most likely to carry granular regional vendor-share and product-segment data — require an active subscription; no regional or intelligent-share breakdown was retrievable from public snippets.
No source in this batch independently corroborates or refutes the IndexBox-sourced '10–12% CAGR' intelligent-PDU growth rate cited in the node's cross-check derivation.
No confirmation was found of the 39.8% CE-7-of-Europe-colo-MW figure (Statista 2025) used in the node's top-down scope-down chain.
